# Flo Docs for Language Models

Flo is a unified distributed runtime that provides streams, key-value storage, queues, time-series storage, actions, workflows, and stream processing in a single binary.

Generated: 2026-06-05
Canonical docs site: https://docs.floruntime.io/
Canonical full corpus: https://docs.floruntime.io/llms-full.md

This file is a compact index. Use it to discover the relevant canonical pages before loading the full corpus.

## Sections

### Getting Started
Install Flo, start the runtime, and learn the core operating model.

- Configuration: https://docs.floruntime.io/getting-started/configuration/
- Installation: https://docs.floruntime.io/getting-started/installation/
- Welcome to FloRuntime: https://docs.floruntime.io/getting-started/introduction/
- Quick Start: https://docs.floruntime.io/getting-started/quickstart/

### Primitives
KV, streams, queues, and time-series APIs and behavior.

- KV: https://docs.floruntime.io/primitives/kv/
- Queues: https://docs.floruntime.io/primitives/queues/
- Streams: https://docs.floruntime.io/primitives/streams/
- Time-Series: https://docs.floruntime.io/primitives/time-series/

### Orchestration
Actions, workers, workflows, and stream processing.

- Actions: https://docs.floruntime.io/orchestration/actions/
- Stream Processing: https://docs.floruntime.io/orchestration/processing/
- Workers: https://docs.floruntime.io/orchestration/workers/
- Workflows: https://docs.floruntime.io/orchestration/workflows/

### Architecture
Threading, storage, and internal runtime design.

- Architecture Overview: https://docs.floruntime.io/architecture/overview/
- Storage Internals: https://docs.floruntime.io/architecture/storage/

### Deployment
Docker and clustering guidance for running Flo.

- Clustering: https://docs.floruntime.io/deployment/clustering/
- Docker Deployment: https://docs.floruntime.io/deployment/docker/
- DigitalOcean Terraform Module: https://docs.floruntime.io/deployment/terraform/

### Reference
CLI, REST, Redis compatibility, and wire protocol details.

- CLI Reference: https://docs.floruntime.io/reference/cli/
- Redis Compatibility: https://docs.floruntime.io/reference/redis/
- REST API: https://docs.floruntime.io/reference/rest-api/
- Web Console: https://docs.floruntime.io/reference/web-console/
- Wire Protocol: https://docs.floruntime.io/reference/wire-protocol/

### SDKs
Client library guidance for Go, JavaScript, Python, and Zig.

- Go SDK: https://docs.floruntime.io/sdks/go/
- JavaScript / TypeScript SDK: https://docs.floruntime.io/sdks/javascript/
- SDK Overview: https://docs.floruntime.io/sdks/overview/
- Python SDK: https://docs.floruntime.io/sdks/python/
- Zig SDK: https://docs.floruntime.io/sdks/zig/

## Consumption Notes

- Prefer the canonical section page when answering a narrow question.
- Use llms-full.md when you need cross-section context in one file.
- Treat codebase behavior as authoritative when docs and implementation differ.
